name: Janice Table Lamp (Set of 2) - 31.5 Inch Height - LIT4397 - Clear/Off White - Safavieh
description: Illuminate your space with the Janice table lamp that offers both elegance and style. This lamp showcases a sleek design with a clear and off white color combination that perfectly complements modern interiors. Crafted with a mirrored surface, this piece reflects light beautifully and adds a touch of sophistication to any room. The clean lines and subtle hues provide a versatile look that can seamlessly fit into your home decor. Ideal for living rooms, bedrooms, or any setting that needs a gentle glow, the Janice table lamp is more than just a lighting solution; it is a statement accessory for your home. Brighten up your space with understated style and enjoy the inviting ambiance it creates.
